markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the draft content strategy and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Refined:** The strategy will shift from an expense-heavy focus to balance Navan's "land with travel, expand with expense" model. It will also add a key differentiator: "white glove" support, using competitor Reed & Mackay as a keyword benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [**Competitive Content:** A dual approach will be used: official comparison pages for strategic competitors, and blog posts for long-tail keywords (e.g., "Spendesk vs. Navan"). This strategy aims to capture more search territory and improve LLM readability.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** To accelerate alignment, GrowthX will deliver 1–2 draft blog posts for review next week. This provides a concrete example of the new strategy before the full content calendar is built.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2473.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** GrowthX will set up Scrunch and Looker dashboards to track traditional search and AI visibility. Navan will provide lead conversion data to measure content ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2435.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Framework

  - [GrowthX presented a draft strategy using a hub-and-spoke model to target decision-makers.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [The framework has three main clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
    1.  [**Persona-Based:** 7 subclusters targeting specific roles (CFOs, Procurement, etc.).](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
    2.  [**Competitive Comparisons:** Blog posts and buyer guides.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
    3.  [**AI-Powered T\&E:** Thought leadership on Navan's AI agent.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)

### Strategic Feedback & Refinements

  - [**Travel vs. Expense Balance:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
      - [**Problem:** The initial persona examples were too expense-heavy.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The strategy must reflect Navan's "land with travel, expand with expense" model. Finance leaders also experience travel pain points directly and own travel policy.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
      - [**Action:** Balance keywords to include more travel-related topics for all personas.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [**"White Glove" Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
      - [**Problem:** The draft strategy missed this key differentiator.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Premium support is a core value for senior decision-makers.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
      - [**Action:** Add a content pillar on support. Research end-user pain points (e.g., flight changes) and audit competitor Reed & Mackay's keywords for directional guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [**Competitive Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
      - [**Approach:** Use a mixed strategy for comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
          - [**Official Pages:** For strategic competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
          - [**Blog Posts:** For long-tail keywords and reverse comparisons (e.g., "Spendesk vs. Navan") to capture more search territory and improve LLM readability.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [**Conversion:** Blog posts must include strong CTAs (e.g., backlinks to comparison pages) to drive leads.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [**Content Refresh & SEO:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)
      - [**Process:** Navan will identify existing content for refresh. GrowthX will then optimize those pieces by:](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)
          - [Closing content gaps vs. top-ranking pages.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)
          - [Adding proprietary data for recency signals.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)
          - [Adding LLM-friendly elements (FAQs, TLDR summaries).](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)
          - [Updating internal links and messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)

### Logistics & Production

  - [**Artifacts:** Review is ongoing. Erik will grant Annette Notion access.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Imagery:** GrowthX will propose a new visual style, moving beyond stock photos. They will also provide examples of simple, skimmable in-article graphics.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
  - [**Data Sources:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
      - [Navan's three recent BTI reports contain valuable data for LLM-friendly content.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
      - [Navan will provide blog lead conversion data to measure ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [Update content strategy doc with feedback (travel balance, support pillar).](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [Deliver 1–2 draft blog posts for review (next week).](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2473.0)
      - [Set up Scrunch and Looker dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2435.0)
      - [Propose new visual style and in-article graphic examples.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
  - [**Navan:**](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2431.0)
      - [Complete review of artifacts (writing guidelines, personas).](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [Provide blog lead conversion data.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
      - [Identify existing content for refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/fRKkdUYZyvvE7xSARQ2xy7jhoheoDaot?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
